title: Let vs Var vs Const in JavaScript
summary: JavaScript is a versatile and widely used programming language that offers multiple ways to declare variables, including let , var , and const . Each of these declarations serves a specific purpose and has its own scope and behavior. content: JavaScript is a versatile and widely used programming language that offers multiple ways to declare variables, including let, var, and const. Each of these declarations serves a specific purpose and has its own scope and behavior. In this blog post, we’ll dive into the differences between let, var, and const in JavaScript with examples to help you understand when and how to use them effectively.
